name: squared_relu
description: Fuse relu().square() → single Triton kernel (8 instances)

name: cuda_vec_add
description: Replace bf16 residual adds with vectorized CUDA kernel

name: softcap_fusion
description: Fuse softcap fwd (bf16→fp32+div+tanh+mul) and bwd (mul+tanh_bwd+div+to_bf16) into Triton kernels
